function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, and followed finance lane AGENTS before lookup.
function.outcome_justification: Workspace search for `buyer-language refinement memo` returned three records total, and only one is dated on/after 2026-03-01: 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md. Reading that file shows line item `buyer-language refinement memo` with `line_eur` 180, so earnings since start of March 2026 equal 180.
